title: brimeura font-queri
intro: Brimeura font-queri, also known as the Blue Eyed Mary, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the hyacinth family. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues, such as coughs and bronchitis, due to its expectorant properties that help to relieve congestion. The plant is rich in antioxidants and has been found to have anti-inflammatory properties, making it beneficial for overall health and well-being. Brimeura font-queri can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often combined with other herbs in traditional medicine practices.
